name: Filyo with MariaDB
description: Filyo est une application de gestion de fichiers, utilisant MariaDB comme base de données.
author: Filyo

form_fields.label: Log Level
form_fields.hint: Minimum log level (Pino). Use debug for verbose output, warn for quiet, silent to disable all logs.

form_fields.label: Trust Proxy
form_fields.hint: Trust level for reverse proxy headers (X-Forwarded-*). Accepts false, true, an IP address, or a CIDR range (e.g. 10.0.0.0/8). Enable only if Filyo is behind a trusted proxy.

form_fields.label: TUS Chunk Size (MB)
form_fields.hint: Chunk size in MB for proxy-safe upload mode. Lower this if your proxy rejects large requests (Cloudflare: 100 MB, Nginx default: 1 MB, Vercel: 4.5 MB). Has no effect when proxy-safe mode is disabled.

form_fields.label: Cleanup Interval
form_fields.hint: Interval between scheduled cleanup runs (expired files + incomplete TUS uploads). Accepts formats like 30m or 2h.

form_fields.label: Default Registration Quota
form_fields.hint: Default storage quota for users who self-register. Accepts formats like 500MB or 2GB. Set to 0 or leave empty for no quota. Has no effect on accounts created by an admin.
